zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton於1245年出生在英國爾達頓時，他的父親Lord Thomas de Dutton31歲，母親Philippa Standon25歲。他於1271年與Margaret de Risley在英國爾達頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1294年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton于1245年出生在英国爾達頓时，他的父亲Lord Thomas de Dutton31岁，母亲Philippa Standon25岁。他于1271年与Margaret de Risley在英国爾達頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1294年在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton was born in 1245, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, his father, Lord Thomas de Dutton, was 31 and his mother, Philippa Standon, was 25. He married Margaret de Risley in 1271, in Dutton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1294, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton est né en 1245, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Thomas de Dutton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Philippa Standon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Risley en 1271, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1294, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton 1245 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Thomas de Dutton 31 und seine Mutter Philippa Standon 25. Er hat 1271 in Dutton, Cheshire, England Margaret de Risley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1294 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton è nato il nel 1245 nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Thomas de Dutton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Standon, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Risley nel 1271, nel Dutton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1294, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Duttonが1245年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Lord Thomas de Duttonは31歳，母Philippa Standonは25歳であった。1271年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンでMargaret de Risleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1294年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton(이)가 1245년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Thomas de Dutton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Standon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1271년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 Margaret de Risley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton nasceu em 1245, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Thomas de Dutton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Standon, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Risley em 1271, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1294, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton родился в 1245 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Thomas de Dutton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Philippa Standon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Risley в 1271 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1294 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Dutton 8th Lord Dutton nació en 1245, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Thomas de Dutton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Philippa Standon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret de Risley en 1271, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1294, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
